TITLE Harissa Honey Chicken Skewers

#In a large bowl whisk to combine:{
[3 tbl harissa paste]
[3 tbl honey]
[3 tbl olive oil]
[2 tbl lemon juice] 
[3 cloves garlic[, minced] ]
[1.5 tsp cumin]
[1.5 tsp paprika]
[1 tsp salt]
}.  

# Transfer 1/3 of marinade to a small saucepan. Reduce until slightly syrupy.  
# Cut [1.5 lbs chicken breast] into 1 inch cubes. Toss with marinade to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or up to 8 hours. 
# Skewer chicken & grill.  
# Brush with reduced glaze. Serve immediately.
